author: Vincent Voyer
subject: feat(connectors API): consistent default/current refinement naming (algolia/react-instantsearch#1423)
body:
Move from:
- selectedItem
- selectedItems
- default*

to:
- currentRefinement (forwarded prop)
- defaultRefinement (connector prop)

Linked to algolia/react-instantsearch#1305

This is the first pass at providing an easier to use connector API.

Still missing:
- forwarded consistent `items` (+ isRefined)
- `toggle` method
